title: 10 best herbal teas for knee swelling
intro_desc: Herbal teas for knee swelling are natural remedies made from plant extracts that help alleviate water retention and inflammation in the knee joints. These teas are effective in reducing swelling due to their anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. The best herbal teas for knee swelling include Glycyrrhiza glabra, Achillea millefolium, Curcuma longa, Zingiber officinale, Equisetum arvense, Hamamelis virginiana, Vaccinium myrtillus, Cinchona officinalis, Urtica dioica, and Aloe barbadensis. If left untreated, knee swelling can significantly impact daily life, causing limited mobility, chronic pain, and fatigue, ultimately affecting one's overall quality of life and ability to perform daily tasks.
